description_long: This is a semi-automatic handgun with a metallic silver slide and a dark, textured grip. The frame and slide are constructed from metal, with the slide featuring visible serrations for improved handling. The grip panels are dark brown or black, ergonomically contoured, and secured with screws, providing a secure hold. The trigger is skeletonized with three holes, and the trigger guard is rounded and robust, offering ample space for finger placement. The barrel is exposed at the muzzle, and the magazine base is flat and slightly extended. Markings and engravings are present on the slide, indicating manufacturer and model details.
description: A metallic semi-automatic handgun with a silver slide, dark textured grip, and visible slide serrations. The design features a skeletonized trigger and engraved markings on the slide.
description_view_0: Side view showing the silver slide, dark grip panels, skeletonized trigger, and engraved markings on the slide.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the barrel opening, front sight, and the width of the slide.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the grip texture, slide serrations, and the magazine base.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the hammer, rear sight, and the backstrap of the grip.
attribute_grip_design: The grip features a dark, matte finish with a slightly contoured ergonomic shape for comfortable handling. It is secured with two visible screws and has a subtle texturing pattern for enhanced grip. The backstrap is straight, and the grip panels appear to be made of a durable polymer or composite material. No visible logos or finger grooves are present, giving it a classic, utilitarian appearance.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is rounded and robust, with a smooth finish and moderate thickness. It provides ample space for finger placement and does not feature any undercuts, squared-off edges, or integrated accessories. The design is simple and functional, with no visible texturing or reinforcement.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is of standard length, with a smooth, unthreaded profile and a visible muzzle opening. There are no compensators, suppressor threads, or porting present. The exterior finish matches the metallic slide, and no additional markings are visible on the barrel itself.
attribute_slide_markings: The slide features engraved markings on the left side, including a serial number, model designation, and manufacturer information. The engravings are clear and prominent, located just above the trigger area and towards the rear of the slide. No decorative patterns or logos are visible on the slide.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and slightly extended, with a beveled edge for easier insertion and removal. It lacks finger rests, logos, or additional texturing, maintaining a simple and functional design.
